title: atractocarpus decorus
intro: Atractocarpus decorus is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the red stinging tree due to its stinging hairs and bright red latex. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atractocarpus decorus include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling the leaves in water or using the latex as a poultice to apply topically, and it has also been used in various herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
